data.body:
PASS-1 review [E4 Assumption/premise verification] — CLEAN, no findings.

Verified every codebase assertion in the plan via Read/Grep:
- "B-RETIRE removed bespoke orchestrator.run_review, the ONLY producer of per-pass metrics" — corroborated by tests/unit/test_plan_review.py:396-404 and src/rebar/llm/plan_review/workflow_ops.py:9.
- "db7b AC5: coverage['metrics'] = {det_ms, llm_ms, total_ms, llm_calls, claim_path}" — corroborated by test_plan_review.py:403 and src/rebar/llm/plan_review/sidecar.py:139-141.
- "The workflow plan-review path does not emit them, coverage['metrics'] now absent on the workflow gate" — corroborated by test_plan_review.py:405 ("the workflow path does not yet emit them, so coverage['metrics'] is absent there").
- "the sidecar emits {}" — corroborated by sidecar.py:141 (`.get("metrics", {})` defaults to {} when coverage lacks the key).
- "metrics fed passive latency/cost-target refinement from dogfood data" — consistent with the surrounding docstrings.

All assertions are grounded and accurate; none are unverifiable or contradicted by source.

Affirmations (E4): codebase-assertion verification; fail-closed evidence; named-impl read.
